rewritten_requirements: The system shall verify login credentials upon submission.
The system shall display an error message and prevent further interaction if login details are incorrect.
The system shall allow users to view products or update their information after a successful login.
The system shall allow users to select items and place an order when viewing products.
The system shall add selected product items to the order and prepare billing details.
The system shall allow users to choose a payment method after adding products to their order.
The system shall process and deliver the order if the payment is successful.
The system shall end the process without further action if the payment fails.
The system shall allow users to save updated information after entering new details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system verifies login credentials upon submission.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user starts by logging in. If the login details are correct, they can access the system.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If login details are incorrect, the system displays an error message and prevents further interaction.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If not, they see an error and cannot continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After successful login, users can view products or update their information.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, the user can either view products or update their information.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When viewing products, users can select items and place an order.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to view products, they select items and place an order.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Selected product items are added to the order and billing details are prepared.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The selected items are added, and billing details are prepared.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can choose a payment method after adding products to their order.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user then chooses a payment method.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the payment is successful, the order is processed and delivered.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the payment is successful, the order is processed and delivered.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the payment fails, the process ends without further action.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the payment is not successful, it ends there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can update their information by entering new details and saving them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user chooses to update their information, they enter new details and save them, and then it ends.
